summary: Kang Hyunwoo enters a multi-stage dungeon to prove his strength, quickly clearing early tests that focus on academic subjects and magic patterns. His unconventional talent—engraving stone with his bare fingers instead of using a pen—shocks his master Lebron and the Archmage Serped. As he progresses through the stages, Hyunwoo rapidly gains levels and skill proficiency, eventually reaching the eighth stage where he faces a dummy modeled after a formidable opponent named Dhakan, aided by his pet, Tangyi.
key_moments: Hyunwoo breezes through the first two stages by answering questions on history, culture, and arts.
Archmage Serped is astonished to find that Hyunwoo completed the third stage using his fingers to engrave stone instead of the provided magical pen.
Hyunwoo reaches level 144 after completing stage seven and prepares to fight a dummy version of Dhakan in stage eight with help from Tangyi.
